PLAINTIFF STEVEN CADILLO'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO QUASH OR, IN THE ALTERNATIVE TO MODIFY, SUBPOENAS FOR PRODUCTION OF BUSINESS RECORDS. GRANTED. DOCUMENTS NEED ONLY BE PRODUCED FROM 2007 TO DATE AS TO ANXIETY, STRESS, DEPRESSION, EMOTIONAL DISTRESS, SLEEPLESSNESS AND LACK OF APPETITE, AND FROM JANUARY 22, 2010 TO DATE AS TO THE LEG INJURY. (PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, NOT REPORTED (301)

MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF STEVEN CADILLO's Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Or, In The Alternative To Modify, Subpoenas For Production Of Business Records. Granted. Documents need only be produced from 2007 to date as to anxiety, stress, depression, emotional distress, sleeplessness and lack of appetite, and from January 22, 2010 to date as to the leg injury. (Prevailing party to submit a form of order). Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported (301/PJB)
